content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Clean implementation. render_scope_guidance() correctly generates scope-aware planning instructions from bead contract sections and is empty for non-milestone prompts (backward compat). The resolve/render split in build_stage_prompt is semantically equivalent to the original resolve_and_render. inject_scope_guidance handles legacy templates without the classification_guidance placeholder correctly, with proper capacity calculation and deduplication guard. All 785 tests pass. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
